item.title: Gardner, travel, Gibson trial
item.ns0:title: Gardner, travel, Gibson trial
item.description:
Tonight on Our News, the political showdown intensifies as the opposition demands clarity on who is funding the legal defense for a Bahamian detained in the United States on drug charges. We also bring you the latest on three law enforcement officers hauled before the courts in a major cocaine trafficking conspiracy and provide an update on the expungement of criminal records for hundreds of Bahamians. Our team also investigates the latest parliamentary clash over government travel expenditures and highlights a heartwarming $10,000 donation to support special needs students in Grand Bahama. Join us for these headlines, the latest from the track and field nationals, and your complete tropical weather outlook as the record-breaking heat wave continues.
-----
Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing.
item.ns1:encoded:
Tonight on Our News, the political showdown intensifies as the opposition demands clarity on who is funding the legal defense for a Bahamian detained in the United States on drug charges. We also bring you the latest on three law enforcement officers hauled before the courts in a major cocaine trafficking conspiracy and provide an update on the expungement of criminal records for hundreds of Bahamians. Our team also investigates the latest parliamentary clash over government travel expenditures and highlights a heartwarming $10,000 donation to support special needs students in Grand Bahama. Join us for these headlines, the latest from the track and field nationals, and your complete tropical weather outlook as the record-breaking heat wave continues.
-----

item.ns0:summary:
Tonight on Our News, the political showdown intensifies as the opposition demands clarity on who is funding the legal defense for a Bahamian detained in the United States on drug charges. We also bring you the latest on three law enforcement officers hauled before the courts in a major cocaine trafficking conspiracy and provide an update on the expungement of criminal records for hundreds of Bahamians. Our team also investigates the latest parliamentary clash over government travel expenditures and highlights a heartwarming $10,000 donation to support special needs students in Grand Bahama. Join us for these headlines, the latest from the track and field nationals, and your complete tropical weather outlook as the record-breaking heat wave continues.
-----

item.ns0:author: Our News Bahamas
